description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On April 5, 2023 at 10:46 AM PST a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Potrero Avenue at 21st Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound on Potrero Avenue in the leftmost lane as it was approaching the intersection with 21st Street. 
The signal for traffic proceeding south on Potrero Avenue was green for the Waymo AV as it approached the intersection. As the Waymo 
AV approached, an individual riding a motorized scooter traveling north on Potrero Avenue proceeded to turn left onto westbound 21st 
Street, across the paths of the Waymo AV and other oncoming vehicles. The Waymo AV began to brake, and the Waymo AV test driver 
transitioned to manual mode and brought the Waymo AV to a stop. A passenger car traveling directly behind the Waymo AV then made 
contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. The individual riding the scooter was not contacted by the Waymo AV or any other vehicle. At the 
time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. Both 
the Waymo AV and the passenger car sustained damage, and the individual on the motorized scooter left the scene.
Print
Clear Form
